expected_path_note: final=Y -> cooled_down path a: ended ~15 months ago (>=12), construction-linked wealth ~12% and stable for over a year, no return plans -> cooled_down_siap
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 19 – Former Owner Exited Fifteen Months Ago Wealth Reallocated
activities: Claire Fontaine sold her stake in a contractor active on national road projects in Cambodia about 15 months ago and left its board at the same time. She immediately reinvested the proceeds: today around 12% of her wealth remains linked to the construction sector (a vendor loan from the sale), a proportion unchanged since shortly after the exit, with the rest in listed equities and Paris real estate. She now runs an unrelated wine-import business and told the adviser she considers her construction chapter closed.
origin_of_assets: Sale of her construction shareholding 15 months ago; wine-import business.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Predominantly securities and Paris property; residual vendor loan from the 2025 exit.
